block_01: How do you know when to sell and when to buy without having to study complex trading manuals? IQ Option indicators are meant to do just that. The right combination of indicators can tell you a lot about price movement.
block_02: The following combo is widely used to spot the trend and get strong BUY or SELL signals.
block_04: Shows how strong the trend is and when it's likely to reverse.
block_07: Shows average price for your instrument over a certain time period.
block_10: Spots an emerging trend, whether upward or downward.
block_12: When used together, these indicators can give you a clear signal and help make a balanced decision.
block_13: Example of successful trend trading using indicators
block_14: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_22: In this trio, RSI leads the way showing the possible reversal points, SMA confirms the signal, and MACD confirms the signals of the first two indicators.
block_23: When SMA crosses the candlestick chart from above, it is a signal to SELL. A crossing from below is a BUY signal.
block_24: MACD gives a SELL signal when it shows red bars with the blue line crossing the orange one downwards.
block_25: When the blue line crosses the orange line upwards from below, it’s a BUY signal.
block_26: RSI gives a SELL signal if the base line moves towards the oversold level. If the base line moves towards the overbought level, it's a signal to BUY.
block_27: Traditionally, the RSI is considered overbought when above 70% and oversold when below 30%.
block_29: The candle chart is crossing the line from below and moving above it
block_35: The blue line is crossing the orange line upwards from below
block_37: SMA+RSA+MACD combo suits all types of instruments and timeframes!
